ModMetadata.Name: Entropy.CodeEditor
ModMetadata.Author: Aberro
ModMetadata.Description:
[h1]Entropy.CodeEditor[/h1]
Advanced source code editor for programmable chips in Stationeers.
Discussion: https://discord.com/channels/1370137389837717545/1476117082906296451 Source code: https://github.com/Aberro/Entropy
[b]WARNING:[/b] This is a StationeersLaunchPad Plugin Mod. It requires Bepinex to be installed with the StationeersLaunchPad plugin. See: https://github.com/StationeersLaunchPad/StationeersLaunchPad
ModMetadata.InGameDescription: Entropy.CodeEditor Advanced source code editor for programmable chips in Stationeers. Supports syntax highlighting, built-in color themes, color theme customization, importing/exporting code, auto-pausing the game, and it's much more performant than default code editor. Discussion: https://discord.com/channels/1370137389837717545/1476117082906296451 Source code: https://github.com/Aberro/Entropy WARNING: This is a StationeersLaunchPad Plugin Mod. It requires Bepinex to be installed with the StationeersLaunchPad plugin. See: https://github.com/StationeersLaunchPad/StationeersLaunchPad
